result:
If I could change the world in one way, I would want to eliminate poverty and ensure that every human being has their basic needs met - nutritious food, clean water, safe shelter, healthcare, and education. I believe that if we could lift everyone out of extreme poverty and give them the foundation to lead healthy, secure lives with opportunities to learn and grow, it would unlock immense human potential and make the world a far better place. 

Poverty is at the root of so much needless suffering. It holds people back from being able to realize their capabilities and contribute their gifts to the world. In a world without poverty, I believe we would see an explosion of innovation, creativity, knowledge and human flourishing. There would be more great scientists, artists, leaders, and visionaries from all walks of life. We would accelerate progress on global challenges as more minds and talents are brought to bear.

Ending poverty is an immense challenge that would require major systemic changes and a worldwide commitment. But if I could wave a magic wand and change one thing, that's what I would choose. A world where everyone's inherent human dignity is respected and their potential is nurtured - that's the world I dream of.
